subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1900
subcodes.first_line: Every material thing we see around us, represents some spiritual idea. As there is an outward, material reality, so there is also an inward, spiritual reality.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @Manifestation of God as educator, @need for an educator, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
